audit_result.proof_trace: The anti-equivocation check (spec requirement #12) is delegated to seenGossipBlockInput which keys by blockRootHex. Two equivocating columns (same slot, proposer, index but different content/signatures) have different blockRootHex values, so both pass validation. Unlike block validation which uses seenBlockProposers keyed by (slot, proposer), columns lack per-(slot, proposer, index) deduplication.
audit_result.attack_scenario: Malicious proposer sends two DataColumnSidecars for (slot=N, proposer=V, index=I) with different content and valid signatures. Both are accepted and stored under different blockRootHex keys, enabling equivocation attacks.

PROP-6a4369e9-inv-013.text: Anti-equivocation cache must be updated for all imported data columns regardless of publishing.
